description_long: This is a medium-sized baguette-style bread loaf with a golden-brown, crisp crust and several diagonal slashes across the top, revealing a lighter, airy interior. The surface is dusted with a light layer of flour and possibly some herbs or coarse salt, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The loaf is elongated and slightly tapered at the ends, with a well-baked, caramelized exterior. The underside appears slightly lighter in color, with some toasting and browning visible. The bread's texture suggests a crunchy crust with a soft, porous crumb inside. There are no visible packaging, branding, or labels present on the bread.
description: A golden-brown, baguette-style bread loaf with diagonal slashes and a rustic, flour-dusted crust. The loaf is elongated, crisp, and artisanal in appearance.
description_view_0: The top view shows the full length of the bread, highlighting the diagonal slashes and the golden, textured crust with visible flour and herbs.
description_view_1: The end view displays the rounded, tapered end of the loaf and the depth of the slashes, emphasizing the thickness of the crust.
description_view_2: The underside view reveals a lighter, more evenly browned surface with some toasting and less visible scoring.
description_view_3: The opposite end view shows the other tapered end, with a smooth, rounded finish and less detail compared to the top.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features several deep, diagonal slashes across the top, with a rustic, flour-dusted finish and a slightly rough, artisanal texture.
